name: UNO
description: UNO is the iconic shedding card game invented in 1971 by Ohio barber Merle Robbins to settle a Crazy Eights argument with his son. Each player races to empty their hand by matching the top discard's color or number — but the deck is loaded with chaos: Skips, Reverses, Draw Twos, Wild cards, and the dreaded Wild Draw Four. Forget to shout 'UNO' when you have one card left and you draw four more. Quick rounds, brutal swings, family-destroying alliances.
